title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 115.255 - Electronic voting machines used, paper ballots permitted, when
text:
115.255.  Electronic voting machines used, paper ballots permitted, when. — The use of separate paper ballots for questions and candidates in polling places shall not be prohibited where electronic voting machines are used.
(L. 1977 H.B. 101 § 8.315, A.L. 2014 H.B. 1136)
